methods.name: libtiepie.server.Server.disconnect
documentation:
Disconnect from a specified Instrument Sharing Server.

```
param force

If True all open devices are closed, if False remove only succeeds if no devices are open.

returns

True if successful, False otherwise.
```

% version added:: 1.0

methods.name: libtiepie.server.Server.remove
documentation:
Remove a specified Instrument Sharing Server from the list of servers.

```
param force

If True all open devices are closed, if False remove only succeeds if no devices are open.

returns

True if successful, False otherwise.
```

% version added:: 1.0

Copyright (c) 2024 TiePie engineering

Website: http://www.tiepie.com/LibTiePie

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger._get_is_available
documentation: Check whether the channel trigger is available, with the current oscilloscope settings.

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger.is_available_ex
documentation:
Check whether the channel trigger is available, for a specific configuration.

```
param measure_mode

Measure mode, a TIEPIE_HW_MM_* value.

param sample_rate

sample rate in Hz.

param resolution

Resolution in bits.

param channel_enabled

Pointer to buffer with channel enables.

param channel_trigger_enabled

Pointer to buffer with channel trigger enables.

param channel_count

Number of items in channel_enabled and channel_trigger_enabled.

returns

True if available, False otherwise.
```

% version added:: 1.0

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger._get_is_triggered
documentation: Check whether the channel trigger caused a trigger.

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger.get_kinds_ex
documentation:
Get the supported channel trigger kinds, for a specific measure mode.

```
param measure_mode

Measure mode, a TIEPIE_HW_MM_* value.

returns

Supported trigger kinds, a set of OR-ed TIEPIE_HW_TK_* values.
```

% version added:: 1.0

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger._get_kind
documentation: Currently selected channel trigger kind.

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger._get_level_mode
documentation: Current trigger level mode.

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger.get_conditions_ex
documentation:
Get the supported trigger conditions, for a specific measure mode and trigger kind.

```
param measure_mode

Measure mode, a TIEPIE_HW_MM_* value.

param trigger_kind

Trigger kind, a TIEPIE_HW_TK_* value.

returns

Supported trigger conditions for this channel, measure mode and trigger kind, a set of OR-ed TIEPIE_HW_TC_* values.
```

% version added:: 1.0

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger._get_condition
documentation: Current selected trigger condition.

methods.name: libtiepie.oscilloscopechanneltrigger.OscilloscopeChannelTrigger.verify_time_ex
documentation:
Verify if the required trigger time value, measure mode, sample rate, trigger type and trigger condition can be set.

```
param index

The trigger time index, 0 to <tt>tiepie_hw_oscilloscope_channel_trigger_get_time_count() - 1</tt>.

param value

The required trigger time value, in seconds.

param measure_mode

The required measure mode.

param sample_rate

Sample rate in Hz.

param trigger_kind

The required trigger kind.

param trigger_condition

The required trigger condition.

returns

The actually trigger time value that would have been set, in seconds.
```

% version added:: 1.0

methods.name: libtiepie.generator.Generator.verify_trailing_edge_time_ex
documentation:
Verify if a trailing edge time can be set, with the specified signal type, frequency, symmetrym pulse width and trailing edge time, without actually setting the hardware itself.

```
param trailing_edge_time

The requested trailing edge time in seconds.

param signal_type

The requested signal type, a TIEPIE_HW_ST_* value.

param signal_frequency

The requested signal frequency in Hz.

param symmetry

The requested signal symmetry, a number between 0 and 1.

param width

The requested pulse width in seconds.

param leading_edge_time

The requested leading edge time in seconds.

returns

The trailing edge time that would have been set, in seconds.
```
